results.title: Meta Platforms, Inc. (META) Analyst Ratings - Yahoo Finance
Meta Platforms Analyst Ratings and Price Targets | Benzinga
Meta Platforms (META) Stock Forecast and Price Target 2026
Meta Stock: Shock And Awe (Rating Downgrade)

summary: Consensus Strong Buy from ~40 analysts as of April 29-30, 2026. Rothschild upgraded to Buy Jan 26, 2026. JPMorgan downgraded META on April 30 post-earnings (rising capex concern). Some analysts moved to Hold. Distribution: ~20 Strong Buy, 18 Buy, 4 Hold, 0 Sell.
